subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath sent down the verses and made manifest the clear proofs, and caused all things to speak forth that there is none other God but Him. He hath ever been established in His sovereignty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل الایات و اظهر البینات و انطق الاشیاء علی انه لا اله الا هو لم یزل کان مستویا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @firmness in the Covenant
